Title: Dedicates a portion of the state highway system to PFC Travis C. Krege
Summary: Dedicates a portion of the state highway system constituting the bridge on Cleveland Drive crossing interstate route 90 in the town of Cheektowaga, county of Erie, to PFC Travis C. Krege.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the highway law, in relation to dedicating a portion of the state highway system to PFC Travis C. Krege
